title: Bunker
description: Will you be able to become one of the survivors?
body:
![bunker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ec5a44fb6d68f7099a4cc300ba2b79bd1091dfc_0.webp)
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54da892dc9ee761d5cdab0b32d883a65ccb5edf.png)
[![link_youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ed14b526841e09e3e52db72a2ac32071c74c02d.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@Bluebird-Studios-Official)
[![link_discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c67e4bef23af27e8404d1106a0746a46da45843.png)](https://discord.gg/hjtaaJHcCN)
[![link_telegram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbb0583fd89cdc327e1b4de1bd797fbca93c6dcd.png)](https://t.me/bluebirdstudios)
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b54da892dc9ee761d5cdab0b32d883a65ccb5edf.png)
This mod is a visual version of the card game Bunker. 

**The main features of our mod are:**
- The absence of a presenter. The game is completely autonomous.
- The game lasts from 1 hour.
- Dynamic game, limited in time.
- Functional GUI.
- And many other things. Download to try it!

### To get the button, enter the command:   
/give @s bunker:start_button
